SetItemDate

Description

Sets the value of a row and column in a DataWindow control to the specified value.

Obsolete method

SetItemDate is obsolete and should not be used, because the Web DataWindow technology is obsolete. Use SetItem instead.

Applies to

DataWindow control

Syntax

Web DataWindow server component

short dwcontrol.SetItemDate ( long row, string column, string value )

Arguments

ArgumentDescription
rowRow number.
columnColumn name.
valueDate value.

Return value

Short. Returns 1 if it succeeds and -1 if an error occurs.

See also

SetItem
